debug_info.goal:
a b : Rat
hb : 0 ≤ b
⊢ a.abs = b ↔ a = b ∨ a = -b

proof:
constructor
  · intro h
    unfold Rat.abs at h
    split at h
    · right; omega
    · left; omega
  · intro h
    unfold Rat.abs
    cases h with
    | inl h => 
      subst h
      split
      · next h => simp at h; exact Rat.nonneg_antisymm hb (Rat.nonneg_iff_sub_nonpos.mpr h)
      · rfl
    | inr h =>
      subst h
      split
      · next h => simp
      · next h => simp at h; exact Rat.nonneg_antisymm (Rat.nonneg_sub_iff_nonpos.mpr h) hb
